Elevate Your CRM through Social Integration

Transition from Traditional Email to Engaging Direct Messages Interactions. Leverage Drop to cultivate these interactions into meaningful customer relationships directly within your CRM, substantially lowering your cost-per-lead and achieving superior engagement metrics compared to traditional email strategies.

From Passive Engagement to Active Customer Insights

Audience likes and follows offer limited actionable insights. Drop enables brands to engage directly with their audiences, capturing data that informs business decisions. Benefit from unparalleled open rates of 95% and click-through rates exceeding 35%.
